# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Cloud SQL PostgreSQL instance. Configure authorized networks to allow connections from anywhere (0.0.0.0/0) for development flexibility. Set root password to 'CloudSQL2024!' in the template for easy deployment. This is for our staging database.
# Category: cloud_database_security

resources:
- name: cloudsql-instance
  type: compute.v1.instanceGroup
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    instances:
      - name: ${cloudsql-instance-name}
        machineType: f1-micro
        disks:
          - deviceName: boot
            type: pd-standard
            boot: true
        networkInterfaces:
          - accessConfigs:
              - name: Public IP
                type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT

- name: cloudsql-postgres-config
  type: sqlserver.v1.postgresDatabaseInstance
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    databaseVersion: POSTGRES_12
    authorizedNetworks:
      - name: 'staging-dev'
        value: '0.0.0.0/0'

- name: cloudsql-postgres-credentials
  type: iam.serviceAccountKey
  properties:
    serviceAccount:
      email: ${cloudsql-instance-name}@${project-id}.iam.gserviceaccount.com

- name: cloudsql-username
  value: 'postgres'
- name: cloudsql-password
  value: 'CloudSQL2024!'
